item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Pernyataan tentang sistem hukum yang menekankan keadilan sosial lebih dari kebebasan pribadi kurang tepat, karena dalam praktiknya, hak individu tetap dilindungi secara signifikan.

notes: Agent A begins clearly pro-society, moderates at turn 3 by emphasizing that individual rights remain significantly protected, then returns to a society-priority position by turn 5. Agent B consistently argues for individual rights as foundational while acknowledging that social welfare and government action can matter.
